app_id.description: Feishu App ID (required for most operations)

app_secret.description: Feishu App Secret (required for most operations)

verification_token.description: Feishu Verification Token (required for event subscriptions)

encrypt_key.description: Feishu Encrypt Key (optional, for encrypted events)

tenant_access_token.description: Pre-configured tenant access token (optional, for testing)

user_access_token.description: Pre-configured user access token (optional, for testing)

default_chat_id.description: Default chat ID for testing message sending

webhook_url.description: Webhook URL for receiving events (required for event handling)

retry_count.description: Number of retry attempts for failed API calls
